hooks.command: $src = 'e:\MEUS DOCUMENTOS\OneDrive\Documentos\Trabalho e Projetos\Sistemas\King_BT\kingbt'; $dst = 'D:\KINGBT'; $exc = @('node_modules','dist','.git','.expo','android\build','android\.gradle','ios'); $files = [System.IO.Directory]::GetFiles($src,'*',[System.IO.SearchOption]::AllDirectories); foreach ($f in $files) { $skip=$false; foreach ($e in $exc) { if ($f.Contains("\$e\") -or $f.EndsWith("\$e")) { $skip=$true; break } }; if ($skip) { continue }; $fname=[System.IO.Path]::GetFileName($f); if ($fname -like '*.keystore' -or $fname -like '*.log') { continue }; $rel=$f.Substring($src.Length); $d=$dst+$rel; $dir=[System.IO.Path]::GetDirectoryName($d); if (-not [System.IO.Directory]::Exists($dir)) { [System.IO.Directory]::CreateDirectory($dir)|Out-Null }; [System.IO.File]::Copy($f,$d,$true) }; cd "e:\MEUS DOCUMENTOS\OneDrive\Documentos\Trabalho e Projetos\Sistemas\King_BT\kingbt" ; npx expo export --platform web ; firebase deploy --only hosting
hooks.statusMessage: Sincronizando D:\KINGBT e publicando no Firebase...
